info.title: Stripe API
info.description: The Stripe REST API. Please see https://stripe.com/docs/api for more details.

tags.name: Customers
tags.description: Customer objects allow you to perform recurring charges and track multiple charges that are associated with the same customer.

tags.name: Charges
tags.description: The Charge object represents a single attempt to move money into your Stripe account.

tags.name: PaymentIntents
tags.description: A PaymentIntent guides you through the process of collecting a payment from your customer.

tags.name: Subscriptions
tags.description: Subscriptions allow you to charge a customer on a recurring basis.

tags.name: Invoices
tags.description: Invoices are statements of amounts owed by a customer.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Products describe the specific goods or services you offer to your customers.

tags.name: Prices
tags.description: Prices define the unit cost, currency, and billing cycle for both recurring and one-time purchases of products.

get.description: Returns a list of your customers. The customers are returned sorted by creation date, with the most recent customers appearing first.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: A limit on the number of objects to be returned. Limit can range between 1 and 100.

parameters.name: starting_after
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

parameters.name: ending_before
parameters.description: A cursor for use in pagination.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: A case-sensitive filter on the list based on the customer's email field.

parameters.name: created[gt]
parameters.description: Return results where the created field is greater than this value.

parameters.name: created[gte]
parameters.description: Return results where the created field is greater than or equal to this value.

parameters.name: created[lt]
parameters.description: Return results where the created field is less than this value.

parameters.name: created[lte]
parameters.description: Return results where the created field is less than or equal to this value.

name.description: The customer's full name or business name.

description.description: An arbitrary string attached to the object.

metadata.description: Set of key-value pairs that you can attach to an object.

payment_method.description: The ID of the PaymentMethod to attach to the customer.

preferred_locales.description: Customer's preferred languages, ordered by preference.

post.description: Updates the specified customer by setting the values of the parameters passed.

get.description: Returns a list of charges you've previously created.

parameters.name: customer
parameters.description: Only return charges for the customer specified by this customer ID.

amount.description: Amount intended to be collected by this payment, in cents.

customer.description: The ID of an existing customer.

source.description: A payment source to be charged.

post.description: Capture the payment of an existing, uncaptured charge.

amount.description: Amount intended to be collected, in cents.

unit_amount.description: A positive integer in cents representing how much to charge.

created.description: Time at which the object was created. Measured in seconds since the Unix epoch.
